FEDERAL EMPLOYEE SPECIALISTS

Your Service Deserves
a Secure

Retirement.

Federal employees have one of the most comprehensive benefits packages in America — but maximizing FERS, TSP, FEGLI, and FEHB requires specialized expertise most advisors don't have. We speak your language.

Begin Your Federal Review Explore Benefits

"Precision in planning is the ultimate luxury."

Mike Stevens

The Federal Benefits Framework

Four specialized areas of federal employee retirement planning that require deep expertise beyond general financial advisory services.

FERS Masterclass

Complete FERS pension optimization including annuity calculations, survivor benefits, and military buyback analysis. Master your retirement eligibility and timing.

TSP Allocation Strategy

Strategic Thrift Savings Plan management with fund allocation, contribution optimization, withdrawal sequencing, and rollover decision analysis.

FEGLI Efficiency Review

Comprehensive life insurance analysis comparing FEGLI post-retirement costs with private alternatives. Most federal employees can save thousands annually.

FEHB Continuity

Health benefits coordination into retirement including Medicare integration, plan selection optimization, and 5-year rule compliance strategies.
INTERACTIVE INTELLIGENCE

Quantify Your Federal Future.

FERS Calculator

Know Your Numbers

Sample Monthly Annuity $8,450/mo
Years of Service 30years
TSP Return Rate 4.2%annual

Get precise FERS annuity calculations based on your years of service, high-3 salary, and retirement date scenarios. Plan with confidence.

Calculate Your FERS Annuity →
Social Security Coordination

Bridge the Gap

Federal employees have unique Social Security considerations including the FERS supplement bridge, WEP/GPO elimination benefits, and optimal claiming strategies that coordinate with your pension.

Our specialized planning ensures you maximize both your FERS annuity and Social Security benefits through strategic timing and coordination.

Optimize Social Security →
Additional Resources

Federal Retirement Checklist

Comprehensive timeline from 5 years out to your last day. Don't leave benefits on the table with our step-by-step retirement preparation guide.

Federal Benefits Seminar

Join our monthly workshop covering FERS, TSP, FEGLI, and FEHB optimization. Learn alongside other federal employees planning their retirement.

Register for Workshop →
The Gap
"HR can help you understand your benefits, but they can't advise you on financial strategy. Most advisors understand investing, but they've never seen a FERS annuity calculation. We bridge that gap."

Federal employees need specialized advisors who understand the unique complexity of coordinating FERS pensions, TSP accounts, FEGLI insurance, FEHB health benefits, and Social Security. The knowledge gap between generalist advisors and federal-specific expertise costs retirees thousands in missed opportunities and suboptimal decisions.

How We Work

Federal Benefits Strategy

Three specialized steps to maximize your federal retirement benefits.

Step 01

Benefits Analysis

Comprehensive review of your SF-50, TSP statement, FEGLI coverage, and FEHB options to understand your complete federal benefits package and retirement eligibility.

Step 02

Retirement Projections

Model your FERS annuity, Social Security, TSP withdrawals, and taxes under different retirement scenarios to identify your optimal retirement date and strategy.

Step 03

Coordination Strategy

Integrate all federal benefits with your outside assets into a comprehensive retirement income plan that maximizes your lifetime benefits and minimizes taxes.

Schedule Your Federal Benefits Review

Your decades of service have earned you exceptional benefits. Let our specialized expertise ensure you maximize every dollar of your federal retirement package.

Begin Your Review
